channel.title: Posts on Turing Haskell
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Turing Haskell

item.title: Are we at the end of a new Gilded Age?
item.description: Questions: Comparison to the Gilded Age Income Inequality How to measure? Corporate Concentration How to measure Market Share? Anti-Trust Law Break up of railroads The Role of Monopolies Is this time different? Cyclicality of tech
item.content:
• Questions:
    • Comparison to the Gilded Age
      • Income Inequality
        • How to measure?
      • Corporate Concentration
        • How to measure
          • Market Share?
    • Anti-Trust Law
      • Break up of railroads
    • The Role of Monopolies
    • Is this time different?
      • Cyclicality of tech
